name: GitHub Tier-2-entry scale, cross-repo de-referenced — vanilla-tf-cosine
hypothesis: At ~55-repo scale, with references removed and repos held out, does the pilot's robust finding hold — does this weighting still beat plain cosine on issue->fixing-PR retrieval that generalizes across repos?
leakage_checks: references scrubbed from text; train repos disjoint from test repos (cross-repo generalization).
known_limitations: Tier-2-entry scale (~55 repos); bag-of-tokens features; fixes mined from closing keywords; body text truncated. Exploratory. Embeddings / LoRA at scale are a torch follow-up.
